---
title: "Orientation to the Course"
author: "Nicky Wakim"
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-color: "#3070BF"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: "../simple_NW.scss"
    chalkboard: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    width: 1955
    height: 1100
    footer: "Orientation to the Course"
    html-math-method: mathjax
    highlight-style: arrow
execute:
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---


## Some good things to know for this class!

- Copying code: the copy option on all code!
- Accessing the source code for this site via GitHub

## Course Overview

![](../img_slides/course_org.png){fig-align="center" width="60%"}

## Each week

- A "new" week starts on Monday
- You will watch the videos set in the week
- At the end of the week, there is a practice due Sunday night at 11pm
- Some weeks will also have labs due on Sunday night at 11pm
